title: Records crash at Plett Primary
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Nine new records were...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Nine new records were smashed at the Plettenberg Bay Primary School inter-house athletics meeting held on Friday 30 January.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Nine new records were smashed at the Plettenberg Bay Primary School inter-house athletics meeting held on Friday 30 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"The atmosphere was electric at Plett Primary as athletes competed with determination, sportsmanship, and house pride during the 2026 event,\" said Sipho Kenene, biokineticist and sport manager."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The overall house results were: Marlin - 971; Whale - 803; and Dolphin - 567.","html":"The overall house results were: Marlin - 971; Whale - 803; and Dolphin - 567."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Keithlynn Sipongo (red) and Marihanna Luiters (green) contesting the girls U12 150m.","html":"Keithlynn Sipongo (red) and Marihanna Luiters (green) contesting the girls U12 150m."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There's no fun without fun… Oliver Cumming and Samuel Kapp, the only starters in the boys U14 200m race, put a little colour into their friendly rivalry.","html":"There's no fun without fun… Oliver Cumming and Samuel Kapp, the only starters in the boys U14 200m race, put a little colour into their friendly rivalry."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There's no fun without fun… Oliver Cumming and Samuel Kapp, the only starters in the boys U14 200m race, put a little colour into their friendly rivalry.","html":"There's no fun without fun… Oliver Cumming and Samuel Kapp, the only starters in the boys U14 200m race, put a little colour into their friendly rivalry."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
